system.description:
Coldsnap Adept is the Elemental Adept discipline for runners who chose stillness, condensation, and the slow heat-death of opposition. Practitioners are patient and famously calm. They train in cold rooms, in glacial enclaves, in the kind of corporate cryogenics lab that pretends not to have a public relations problem. They have a complicated relationship with comfort.

On the job, the Coldsnap Adept slows the engagement to their preferred pace. Their entry feature is Freeze Hold: any spell they cast may be tagged as cold-aspected; once per encounter they may cause an affected target to suffer a major movement and reaction penalty until the end of the target's next turn.
system.grants: Freeze Hold: spells gain cold aspect; once per encounter a target suffers movement/reaction penalty.

wizard.tagline: Slow the room down until it forgets how to fight
